revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-020

1. Any disagreeable or undesired sound.

2. A class of sounds, generally of a random nature, which do not exhibit clearly defined frequency components.


Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Acoustic noise}}
